Our Specialties

Precision Treatments for
Timeless Beauty

Each treatment is carefully tailored to your skin, body and desired outcome by our certified specialists.

01

Botox & Dysport

Smooth fine lines and restore natural, youthful expression with medical-grade precision.

Learn more
02

Lip Fillers

Artfully sculpted, naturally enhanced lips with premium hyaluronic acid fillers.

Learn more
03

Luxury Facials

Bespoke facial treatments combining advanced technology with the finest skincare formulas.

Learn more
04

Skin Rejuvenation

Restore radiance and texture with cutting-edge RF, ultrasound and collagen-stimulating therapies.

Learn more
05

Laser Treatments

FDA-cleared laser technology for hair removal, pigmentation and total skin transformation.

Learn more
06

Body Sculpting

Non-invasive body contouring with the latest CoolSculpting and EMSculpt technologies.

Learn more
07

Microneedling

Stimulate collagen, reduce scarring and reveal luminous skin with precision microneedling.

Learn more
08

Wellness IV Therapy

Customized IV infusions for radiant skin, energy restoration and total wellness optimization.

Learn more

Our Philosophy

Where Science Meets
Artistry

"True beauty is not about changing who you are — it's about revealing the most luminous version of yourself."

Lumière Aesthetics was founded on a singular belief: that every client deserves treatments as unique as they are. Our board-certified specialists combine medical precision with an artist's eye to deliver results that look natural, feel transformative, and last.

Located in the heart of Miami, our spa offers a sanctuary of calm in a world that never stops moving. From the moment you arrive, every detail has been curated for your comfort and confidence.

Why Lumière

The Lumière
Difference

We don't believe in a one-size-fits-all approach. Every visit, every treatment, every detail is designed around you.

Personalized Treatments

Your skin, your goals, your pace. Every plan is built around your unique anatomy and desired outcomes.

Medical-Grade Expertise

Our board-certified doctors and licensed aesthetic specialists bring clinical precision to every session.

Luxury Environment

From arrival to aftercare, the Lumière experience is designed to feel like a five-star retreat.

Advanced Technology

FDA-approved devices, the latest protocols — we invest in technology that delivers results that last.

Natural Results

We believe in enhancement, not alteration. Our signature approach ensures results no one can place — only admire.

Concierge Service

Private consultations, flexible scheduling, and dedicated aftercare ensure your complete satisfaction.

The Lumière Experience

A sanctuary where luxury and science create the art of becoming.

From the moment you arrive, every detail has been thoughtfully curated for your wellbeing, comfort and transformation.

Sanctuary

A private, serene environment designed to quiet the mind before we begin transforming the skin.

Precision

Every treatment follows a bespoke protocol. Your specialist reviews your skin analysis before each visit.

Continuity

Your dedicated specialist tracks your progress over time, adjusting treatments as your skin evolves.
